description_long: This helmet features a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design with a skull-like front, prominent curved horns on each side, and a central spike protruding from the top. The left side of the helmet is visually distinct, with a large, angular shard embedded in the skull motif and a cracked, jagged edge below the eye socket. The lower rim of the helmet is faceted and dark, contrasting with the lighter, bone-like upper shell. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with the horns curving outward and slightly upward. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, resembling weathered bone or stone. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation features, giving the helmet a stark, intimidating appearance.
description: A fantasy skull-themed helmet with large curved horns, a central spike, and a cracked, jagged motif on one side. The surface is matte and bone-like, with no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the skull face, large horns, central spike, and a prominent crack with an embedded shard on the left side.
description_view_1: Side/top view highlights the central spike, the angular shard, and the curvature of the horns, with the cracked area visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the helmet and the full span of the horns, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side/top view mirrors view 1, showing the central spike and horn curvature, but the cracked area and shard are less visible.
